name: RectangleBoundingBox
summary: The RectangleBoundingBox class represents a bounding box for an object, i.e. the surrounding box of the object. The bounding box contains the calculated corner points of the box. The rectangle bounding box is inherited from the axis-aligned bounding box. The AABB also contains methods for getting the center point of the box.

methods.name: Collide
methods.summary: Checks if the current axis-aligned 3d bounding box collides with another given axis-aligned 3d bounding box. Both axis-aligned 3d bounding boxes need to be in the same coordinate system or in the same workplane, so that they are defined using the same axes.

params.name: Other
params.doc: Another axis-aligned 3d bounding box to be used in the collision check.

returns.doc: True if the axis-aligned 3d bounding boxes collide.

methods.name: CreateRectangleBoundingBox
methods.signature: public static RectangleBoundingBox CreateRectangleBoundingBox(Point CenterPoint, double Width, double Height, double AngleToAxis)
methods.summary: Creates a new RectangleBoundingBox with the given values.

params.name: CenterPoint
params.doc: The center point of the bounding box.

params.name: Width
params.doc: The width of the bounding box.

params.name: Height
params.doc: The height of the bounding box.

params.name: AngleToAxis
params.doc: The angle of the box (compared to the X-axis).

methods.name: GetCenterPoint
methods.summary: Returns the geometric center point of the current axis-aligned 3d bounding box.

returns.doc: The geometric center point of the current axis-aligned 3d bounding box.

methods.name: GetCornerPoints
methods.summary: Returns all corner points of the current axis-aligned 3d bounding box.

returns.doc: All corner points of the current axis-aligned 3d bounding box.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

params.name: ObjectToCompare
params.doc: The object to be used for comparing.

returns.doc: True if all the fields (except for the database GUID) of the objects match.

methods.name: IsInside(LineSegment)
methods.summary: Checks if the given line segment is inside the current axis-aligned 3d bounding box.

params.name: LineSegment
params.doc: The line segment to be checked.

returns.doc: True if the point is inside the current axis-aligned 3d bounding box.

methods.name: IsInside(Point)
methods.summary: Checks if the given point is inside the current axis-aligned 3d bounding box.

returns.doc: True if the point is inside the current axis-aligned 3d bounding box.

methods.name: ToString
methods.summary: Returns the rectangle bounding box values as a string.

returns.doc: The rectangle bounding box values as a string.

properties.name: AngleToAxis
properties.summary: The angle of the bounding box in relation to the axis (the coordinate system's X-plane).

properties.name: Height
properties.summary: The height of the bounding box.

properties.name: LowerLeft
properties.summary: The lower left corner point of the bounding box.

properties.name: LowerRight
properties.summary: The lower right corner point of the bounding box.

properties.name: MaxPoint
properties.summary: The maximum point of the axis-aligned 3d bounding box.

properties.name: MinPoint
properties.summary: The minimum point of the axis-aligned 3d bounding box.

properties.name: UpperLeft
properties.summary: The upper left corner point of the bounding box.

properties.name: UpperRight
properties.summary: The upper right corner point of the bounding box.

properties.name: Width
properties.summary: The width of the bounding box.
